title: helianthus hirtus
intro: Helianthus hirtus, also known as the rough sunflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthus hirtus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
